title: galega somalensis
intro: Galega somalensis, also known as African galega or Somalian galega, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. This perennial herb is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. The plant is rich in glycosides, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing relief from pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of Galega somalensis can be made into infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, and are often used to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and other skin issues, as well as to alleviate symptoms of flu and colds.
